narrative.narrative: ETF inflows and funding rates in BTC futures suggest a risk-on environment, mirroring the summer of 2024 when investors were complacent despite minor daily price fluctuations; fear & greed index at 20 hints at potential bargain hunting opportunities.
narrative.headline: Bargains Beckon as Bitcoin's Summer Replay Unfolds

disagreements_noted: The Pattern Analyst sees a slightly higher confidence (0.85) compared to the Narrative Writer's (0.794), but this discrepancy does not significantly alter the overall consensus.
